Converting 17.16:
17.16 * 0.799:
17.16 * 0.009 = 0.15444
17.16 * 0.090 = 1.54440
17.16 * 0.700 = 12.01200
0.15444 + 1.54440 = 1.69884
1.69884 + 12.01200 = 13.71084
= 13.710

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{13.710}
